```{r}
source("_utils.R")
```

```{r}
#| cache: true
#| cache-extra: !expr rlang::hash(params)
#| cache-file-1: !expr rlang::hash_file("_baseline_query_data.R")
source("_baseline_query_data.R")
```

# Missingness

```{r}
#| cache: true
missingness_cols <- model_predictor_all_name
```

::: {.panel-tabset}

## By class (assessment set)

```{r missing_by_class_assess_transform}
#| cache: true

baseline_missing_assess_class <- baseline_assessment_data %>%
  select(all_of(c("meta_class", missingness_cols))) %>%
  group_by(meta_class) %>%
  summarize(across(everything(), ~ mean(is.na(.)),
    .names = "pct_na_{.col}"
  )) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("pct_na_"),
    names_to = "predictor",
    values_to = "pct_na"
  ) %>%
  mutate(dataset = "baseline")

comp_missing_assess_class <- comp_assessment_data %>%
  select(all_of(c("meta_class", missingness_cols))) %>%
  group_by(meta_class) %>%
  summarize(across(everything(), ~ mean(is.na(.)),
    .names = "pct_na_{.col}"
  )) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("pct_na_"),
    names_to = "predictor",
    values_to = "pct_na"
  ) %>%
  mutate(dataset = "comp")

missing_assess_class <- bind_rows(
  baseline_missing_assess_class,
  comp_missing_assess_class
)
```

```{r missing_by_class_assess_plot}
#| cache: true
#| column: screen-inset
#| fig-height: !expr fig_height(missing_assess_class, ncol = 5)

missing_assess_class %>%
  ggplot(aes(meta_class, pct_na)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = dataset), alpha = 0.5, position = "identity") +
  facet_wrap(~predictor, scales = "free", ncol = 5) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 1),
    labels = scales::label_percent(accuracy = 0.01)
  ) +
  labs(x = "Class", y = "% Missing", fill = NULL) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(size = strip_text_size),
    axis.text = element_text(size = axis_text_size),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.title = element_text(size = axis_title_size)
  )
```

## By class (training set)

```{r missing_by_class_train_transform}
#| cache: true

baseline_missing_train_class <- baseline_training_data %>%
  select(all_of(c("meta_class", missingness_cols))) %>%
  group_by(meta_class) %>%
  summarize(across(everything(), ~ mean(is.na(.)),
    .names = "pct_na_{.col}"
  )) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("pct_na_"),
    names_to = "predictor",
    values_to = "pct_na"
  ) %>%
  mutate(dataset = "baseline")

comp_missing_train_class <- comp_training_data %>%
  select(all_of(c("meta_class", missingness_cols))) %>%
  group_by(meta_class) %>%
  summarize(across(everything(), ~ mean(is.na(.)),
    .names = "pct_na_{.col}"
  )) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("pct_na_"),
    names_to = "predictor",
    values_to = "pct_na"
  ) %>%
  mutate(dataset = "comp")

missing_train_class <- bind_rows(
  baseline_missing_train_class,
  comp_missing_train_class
)
```

```{r missing_by_class_train_plot}
#| cache: true
#| column: screen-inset
#| fig-height: !expr fig_height(missing_train_class, ncol = 5)

missing_train_class %>%
  ggplot(aes(meta_class, pct_na)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = dataset), alpha = 0.5, position = "identity") +
  facet_wrap(~predictor, scales = "free", ncol = 5) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 1),
    labels = scales::label_percent(accuracy = 0.01)
  ) +
  labs(x = "Class", y = "% Missing", fill = NULL) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(size = strip_text_size),
    axis.text = element_text(size = axis_text_size),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.title = element_text(size = axis_title_size)
  )
```

## By time

```{r missing_by_time_transform}
#| cache: true

baseline_missing_time <- bind_rows(
  baseline_assessment_data %>%
    select(any_of(c("time_sale_year", missingness_cols))),
  baseline_training_data %>%
    select(any_of(c("time_sale_year", missingness_cols)))
) %>%
  group_by(time_sale_year) %>%
  summarize(
    across(
      all_of(setdiff(missingness_cols, "time_sale_year")),
      ~ mean(is.na(.)),
      .names = "pct_na_{.col}"
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("pct_na_"),
    names_to = "predictor",
    values_to = "pct_na"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    predictor = sub("^pct_na_", "", predictor),
    dataset = "baseline"
  )

comp_missing_time <- bind_rows(
  comp_assessment_data %>%
    select(any_of(c("time_sale_year", missingness_cols))),
  comp_training_data %>%
    select(any_of(c("time_sale_year", missingness_cols)))
) %>%
  group_by(time_sale_year) %>%
  summarize(
    across(
      all_of(setdiff(missingness_cols, "time_sale_year")),
      ~ mean(is.na(.)),
      .names = "pct_na_{.col}"
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("pct_na_"),
    names_to = "predictor",
    values_to = "pct_na"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    predictor = sub("^pct_na_", "", predictor),
    dataset = "comp"
  )

missing_time <- bind_rows(
  baseline_missing_time,
  comp_missing_time
)
```

```{r missing_by_time_assess_plot}
#| cache: true
#| column: screen-inset
#| fig-height: !expr fig_height(missing_time, ncol = 5)

missing_time %>%
  ggplot(aes(time_sale_year, pct_na)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = dataset), alpha = 0.5, position = "identity") +
  facet_wrap(~predictor, scales = "free", ncol = 5) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = function(x) unique(missing_time$time_sale_year)) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 1),
    labels = scales::label_percent(accuracy = 0.01)
  ) +
  labs(x = "Year", y = "% Missing", fill = NULL) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(size = strip_text_size),
    axis.text = element_text(size = axis_text_size),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    axis.title = element_text(size = axis_title_size)
  )
```

```{r missing_by_time_cleanup}
#| output: false

rm(
  baseline_missing_assess_class, comp_missing_assess_class,
  missing_assess_class, baseline_missing_train_class, comp_missing_train_class,
  missing_train_class, baseline_missing_time, comp_missing_time, missing_time
)
gc()
```

:::
